roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTION ADJUST PRETRIAL RELEASE CONDITIONS FORWORK PURPOSES FILED
PD'S MOT TO CLARIFY CUSTODY STATUS FILED
DA MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED

/CAL:DEFT MOTION TO ADJUST RELEASE CONDITION/VD:HEARING ON 11-19-19/MO GRTD/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:TO SUBMIT DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED;NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPON; NOT CONSUMEANY ALCHOL-MARIJUANA; NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED AND OR CONTROLLED   SUBSTANCE WITHOUT PRESCRIPTION; REMAIN WITHININTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS AUTHORIZED; CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN50 MILES WITHOUT APPROVAL; ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES SUCH AS WORK/CTORD:A MODIFICATION OF HOME DENTION WITH A NEW CURFEW HOURS AS FOLLOW:   8PM TO 5AM IF DEFENEANT HAS EMPLOYMENT/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO WORK FROM 6AM TO 7PM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF ANDPROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWSTAY:10-24-19/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 10-28-19,/X:BAIL SET AT $25000,/ /CONTD:BW STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/X:COURT MODIFIED THE CONDITION OF RELEASE ISSUED ON 07-02-19 AS FOLLOW:/OR/CTORD:ACM IS TERMINATED/CTORD:DEFEDANT TO OBEY A CURFEW OF 7PM TO 6AM; ALL OTHER TERMS REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/

/CAL:MOTION TO RELEASE ON ACM/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHRG CONF/DOP/

/CAL:AND DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/X:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES: 18016080,18002879, AMD 18005571 GRANTED/X:CONSOLIDATED FELONY COMPLAINT FILED ANDSERVED IN OPEN COURT/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
